trust_claims.claim: Volcano travel is unpredictable, so JVTO focuses on operational certainty: disciplined decisions, clear safety boundaries, and realistic expectations.
evidence: Founder Agung Sambuko is an active Tourist Police officer (Ditpamobvit), confirmed by SPRIN POLPAR document (SHA-256: 03c8578dc22956faa366d957badecfe38868d4760359cd8059fb2d6b145dfeab)
Detik.com independently confirmed Bripka Agung as active Polpar (2021-03-14)
Police vehicle support and escort documentation on file
Safety resource mapping: Tourist Police Pam Obvit + Patwal active support, SPRIN docs, APGI guide certification, Ijen Rijik program, red flag system
Structured safety protocol: SAR procedures, Lamborghini evacuation, risk flag system, Sengkan Gandrung braking zone, Green Briefings, PVMBG 500m exclusion zone

trust_claims.claim: JVTO runs private tours by default so timing, pacing, and safety decisions stay consistent for your group.
evidence: All 22 packages are private (dedicated vehicle + crew), confirmed by NIB-1102230032918 and TDUP-1102230032918

trust_claims.claim: JVTO uses an all-inclusive structure by default to reduce surprise costs and mid-trip negotiation.
evidence: Written inclusions/exclusions documented in JVTO Policy Pack v6, confirmed by NIB-1102230032918

trust_claims.claim: On routes that include Mount Ijen, JVTO integrates health screening as a practical safety step, not a formality.
evidence: Regulatory basis: BBKSDA Surat Edaran SE.1658/KSA.9/2024
Licensed medical officer Dr. Ahmad Irwandanu (SIP), verifiable via Kemenkes/KKI (STR: QN00001073380217)
7 Ijen incidents (2015–2026), 4 fatalities — 50% fitness-related (heart attack, exhaustion) — directly validates health screening mandate
Screening system at https://health.mountijen.com

trust_claims.claim: JVTO organizes trust signals as a verification layer: clear claims, context, and evidence links — not just marketing statements.
evidence: NIB, TDUP, HPWKI all publicly verifiable with SHA-256 anchors (NIB: 1102230032918, TDUP: 1102230032918)
14-page visual dossier consolidating all 9 claims with verified document exhibits, SHA-256 anchored

trust_claims.claim: JVTO treats reviews as a registry: grouped by platform and theme, so guests can validate patterns instead of reading random quotes.
evidence: Trustpilot: 4.8/5 (51 reviews)
Google Maps: 4.9/5 (123 reviews)
TripAdvisor: 4.95/5 (21 reviews)

trust_claims.claim: JVTO's product is executed by real people. The Team Registry shows roles, routes, and proof from review mentions — not generic bios.
evidence: 14 crew members (7 guides, 7 drivers) with KTA credentials and review-linked profiles
11 KTA confirmed, 3 KTA pending SSOT verification
HPWKI AHU ID: AHU-0001072.AH.01.07.TAHUN 2024

trust_claims.claim: JVTO partnerships are explained by function: competence context (HPWKI), sustainability context (INDECON), and verification logic (ISIC).
evidence: HPWKI, INDECON, ISIC partnerships with functional descriptions (proof IDs: hpwki-approval, indecon-live-member, isic-live-provider)
BBKSDA-supervised guide training: 250 HPWKI guides, SAR + PPGD (press-bbksda-ijen-guide-training)

trust_claims.claim: JVTO lists press and recognition with context so guests can evaluate third-party references, not just branding claims.
evidence: 4 independent press items + Stefan Loose guidebook (4th edition, 2018, ISBN 978-3-7701-7881-0, DuMont Reiseverlag) + Booking 2015 award
Detik.com coverage (2021-03-14)
Radar Jember / Jawa Pos coverage (2021-03-24)

trust_claims.claim: JVTO requires a down payment (deposit) of approximately 10% of the grand total to confirm bookings
evidence: bookings.dp field stores deposit amount; analysis of 427 bookings with dp>0 shows average dp/grand_total = 28.7%, min 5%, max 137% (outliers suggest some bookings use flat amounts)
Most common deposit tier appears to be 10% based on modal values in sample data
bookings.deposit enum values: 'dp' or 'attachment' — indicating two deposit modes
trust_claims.validation: partial — modal deposit is 10% but average is skewed; no explicit deposit policy table found; policy is inferred from booking data patterns

trust_claims.claim: JVTO accepts Cash, Bank Transfer (PT JAVA VOLCANO RENDEZVOUS, acc 001301001779564), Debit/Credit Card, EDC, WISE, and Pay Later as payment methods
evidence: payment_methods table rows: id=1 Cash, id=2 PT JAVA VOLCANO RENDEZVOUS (bank transfer, acc 001301001779564), id=3 Debit/Credit Card, id=4 EDC, id=5 WISE, id=6 Bank Transfer, id=7 Pay Later
bookings.payment_method enum: 'pay later','paypal','wise','cc'
bookings.outstanding_payment_method enum: 'cash','cc','wise','edc'

trust_claims.claim: JVTO operates through three booking channels: JVTO direct, TWT (travel wholesale/trade), and KLOOK (OTA platform)
evidence: order_channels table: id=1 JVTO, id=2 TWT, id=3 KLOOK
bookings table has klook_uuid, klook_product_id, klook_option_id fields confirming KLOOK integration
twt_invoices, twt_invoice_bookings tables confirm TWT as a separate wholesale channel with its own invoicing
trust_claims.validation: confirmed — data from order_channels and related table structures

trust_claims.claim: KLOOK bookings that are cancelled receive a FULL refund
evidence: All 10 sampled cancellation records in bookings.cancellation field show refund='FULL'
bookings.cancellable field (tinyint default 1) indicates most bookings are cancellable by default
klook_cancel_reason field captures reason for KLOOK cancellations
trust_claims.validation: partial — only KLOOK cancellations observed in data; direct booking cancellation policy not found in structured form

trust_claims.claim: JVTO packages are segmented into three price tiers: Basic, Reguler, and Luxury
evidence: price_plans table: id=1 Basic (#ff6962 red), id=2 Reguler (#3264ff blue), id=3 Luxury (#000 black/gold)
Each plan has distinct color branding indicating consumer-facing presentation

trust_claims.claim: FAQ states JVTO accepts major credit cards, bank transfers, and online payment methods such as PayPal
evidence: faqs table id=42: question='What payment methods do you accept?', answer='We accept major credit cards, bank transfers, and online payment methods such as PayPal.'
trust_claims.validation: confirmed — direct FAQ content; note PayPal is mentioned in FAQ but payment_methods table does not have a PayPal entry (only in bookings.payment_method enum as 'paypal')

trust_claims.claim: Travel insurance is not included in JVTO tour packages and is listed as a standard exclusion
evidence: include_excludes table id=15: description='Travel insurance*', type='ex'
faqs id=52: 'We highly recommend having travel insurance that covers adventure activities.'
faqs id=53: 'We do not offer travel insurance directly, but we can recommend reputable providers.'

trust_claims.claim: International and domestic air tickets are excluded from all JVTO tour packages
evidence: include_excludes id=22: 'International / Domestic air tickets*', type='ex'
include_excludes id=23: 'Air Tickets*', type='ex'
trust_claims.validation: confirmed — standard exclusion items in database

trust_claims.claim: Indonesian VISA costs are excluded from JVTO tour packages
evidence: include_excludes id=16: description='Indonesian VISA', type='ex'
trust_claims.validation: confirmed — standard exclusion item in database

trust_claims.claim: All personal expenses are excluded from JVTO tour packages
evidence: include_excludes id=19: description='All expenses of a personal nature', type='ex'
trust_claims.validation: confirmed — standard exclusion item in database
